name: Balotti White Classic Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Kazi Jeupe la Balotti
description: Crisp white Balotti dress shirt — cotton blend, classic point collar, barrel cuff, chest pocket. The workhorse white shirt every Tanzanian man's wardrobe needs. Pairs with black, navy or grey trousers for office, funeral, or wedding guest.

name: PM White Dress Shirt
description: PM (Purvey of all Things Good) white dress shirt — long sleeve, semi-spread collar, classic fit. Clean and sharp for office wear.

name: Balotti Blue Micro-Print Dress Shirt
description: Balotti dress shirt in soft blue with subtle all-over micro-diamond print. Slim fit with white contrast lining inside the collar — smart office look that stands out without shouting.

name: Balotti Brick Rose Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Balotti la Rangi ya Waridi
description: Balotti dress shirt in muted brick-rose with tonal buttons. Confident color for weekend meetings and after-office events.

name: PM Navy Gingham Check Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la PM la Checki za Navy
description: PM navy and white gingham check long-sleeve shirt. Casual-smart weekend shirt that layers well under a blazer or wears clean with chinos.

name: Balotti Light Grey Dress Shirt
description: Light grey Balotti dress shirt, classic point collar, chest pocket. Pairs with navy or black trousers and a silver tie for formal events.

name: Hardwood Chambray Blue Slim-Fit Shirt
description: Hardwood chambray slim-fit shirt in medium blue with H embroidered chest pocket. Made in Thailand. Lightweight cotton perfect for Dar es Salaam's heat — wear open over a tee or buttoned up with chinos.

name: PM Red Gingham Check Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la PM la Checki Nyekundu
description: PM red and white gingham check long-sleeve shirt — bold casual look for weekends and informal gatherings.

name: PM Cream Ivory Dress Shirt
description: PM soft cream / ivory dress shirt — a warmer alternative to plain white that flatters darker skin tones. Office-ready with any dark trouser.

name: PM Mustard Yellow Gingham Check Shirt
description: PM mustard yellow and white gingham check long-sleeve shirt — a warm statement casual piece that pops against neutral trousers.

name: Balotti Navy Floral Print Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Navy la Maua la Balotti
description: Balotti navy blue shirt with small white botanical leaf print — modern subtle pattern that works for weddings, dinners and events.

name: Balotti Grey Pinstripe Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Balotti la Mistari ya Kijivu
description: Balotti grey dress shirt with fine white pinstripe — classic business wardrobe staple that pairs with a solid navy or black suit.

name: PM Pink Dress Shirt
description: PM light pink dress shirt with tonal buttons. Soft, modern color — smart for spring weddings and weekend brunches.

name: PM Solid Grey Dress Shirt
description: PM solid grey dress shirt — versatile neutral that works with virtually every trouser color. Pictured with dark indigo jeans in the hero shot.

name: PM White Red-Dot Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati Jeupe la Madoa Mekundu la PM
description: PM white dress shirt with small all-over red dot pattern — subtle personality for smart-casual events.

name: Kaishi Grey Oxford Button-Down
description: Kaishi grey Oxford button-down — casual-smart weekend shirt. Soft Oxford weave, button-down collar, relaxed fit.

name: Porto Lucciano Italy Denim-Blue Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Porto Lucciano Italy la Navy
description: Porto Lucciano Italy denim-blue long-sleeve shirt — premium Italian-designed piece with tonal buttons and clean lines. A cut above the basic office shirt.

name: PM White Diamond-Dot Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati Jeupe la PM la Madoa
description: PM white dress shirt with tiny black diamond dot pattern. Understated interest — still office-appropriate.

name: PM Dusty Purple Dress Shirt
description: PM dusty purple long-sleeve dress shirt with tonal buttons. A distinctive color that photographs beautifully at evening events.

name: Hardwood Tropical Leaf Shirt (Navy & White)
description: Hardwood tropical print shirt — navy blue palm & monstera leaves on white cotton. Vacation-ready for Zanzibar, Bagamoyo or a weekend by the coast. Lightweight cotton.

name: PM Black & White Plaid Shirt
description: PM black and white plaid long-sleeve shirt. Bold graphic check for weekend wear — works over a plain tee or buttoned up.

name: Next Burgundy Dress Shirt
description: Next burgundy long-sleeve dress shirt — rich, confident color for dinners and evening wear.

name: Next White Dress Shirt with Blue Collar Trim
description: Next white dress shirt with contrast blue collar lining and placket stripes. Sharp modern touch on a classic white shirt.

name: PM Navy Textured Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la PM la Navy Lililoshonwa
description: PM navy dress shirt with subtle jacquard texture weave. Looks solid navy from across the room but rewards a close look.

name: Balotti Charcoal Grey Dress Shirt
description: Balotti charcoal grey dress shirt — deeper, moodier grey than light grey. Pairs beautifully with a black tie.

name: PM Navy Heather Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la PM la Navy la Heathered
description: PM navy dress shirt in heathered weave with flecks of silver — textured interest while reading as solid navy.

name: Balotti Light Blue Dress Shirt
description: Balotti classic light blue dress shirt — the second most important shirt after white. Pairs with navy, grey or olive trousers. Pictured with Jeep olive chinos in the hero shot.

name: Balotti Lavender Dress Shirt
description: Balotti lavender dress shirt — soft icy purple that flatters on camera. Memorable without being loud.

name: Balotti Royal Blue Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Balotti la Buluu Kali
description: Balotti royal blue dress shirt — saturated, confident blue for evening events and weddings. Pairs with black or charcoal trousers.

name: Balotti White Grey-Pinstripe Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati Jeupe la Mistari la Balotti
description: Balotti white dress shirt with soft grey pinstripe. Business-classic that brings structure to a plain suit.

name: Balotti Grey Mini-Gingham Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Balotti la Checki Ndogo
description: Balotti grey and white mini-gingham dress shirt — neat, subtle texture close-up. Reads as solid grey from a distance.

name: PM Navy Pinstripe Dress Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la PM la Navy lenye Mistari
description: PM navy dress shirt with darker tonal pinstripe — sharp, modern business look.

name: Sage Green Buffalo Check Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Kijani Kibichi la Plaid
description: Sage green and white buffalo check button-down shirt — weekend casual piece with earthy, calm color palette.

name: Balotti Solid Black Dress Shirt
description: Balotti solid black dress shirt with tonal black buttons. Perfect for all-black occasions and evening events.

name: Grey Buffalo Check Casual Shirt
description: Grey and white buffalo check cotton button-down shirt — relaxed weekend wear with a modern color palette.

name: Jack & Jones Navy Pinstripe Shirt
nameSwahili: Shati la Jack & Jones la Navy
description: Jack & Jones navy shirt with white vertical pinstripe — premium branded casual shirt from the Originals line (est. 1975).

name: Jack & Jones White Navy-Pinstripe Shirt
description: Jack & Jones white casual shirt with navy vertical pinstripe and contrast blue inner collar. Signature Originals line detail.

name: Hardwood Lavender-Grey Slim-Fit Shirt
description: Hardwood slim-fit shirt in soft lavender-grey with H embroidered chest pocket. Made in Thailand. Lightweight and cool.

name: Hardwood Tropical Leaf Shirt (Navy & Beige)
description: Hardwood tropical print shirt — beige & cream leaves on deep navy cotton. The darker counterpart to the navy-and-white tropical.

name: Balotti Teal Dress Shirt + Black Trouser Set
nameSwahili: Set la Shati Teal na Suruali Nyeusi
description: Matching Balotti teal long-sleeve dress shirt paired with slim black Zani trousers. Complete event look — ready-to-wear.

name: Hardwood Tropical Shirt + Navy Jeans Set
description: Hardwood navy-beige tropical leaf shirt paired with dark navy denim jeans — complete resort-casual outfit.

name: PM Blue Stripe Shirt + Black Trouser Set
description: PM blue vertical stripe long-sleeve shirt paired with slim black trousers — clean smart-casual outfit.

name: Balotti Pink Pinstripe Shirt + Prada Black Trouser Set
nameSwahili: Set la Shati la Pinki na Suruali Nyeusi
description: Balotti soft pink pinstripe long-sleeve shirt paired with Prada-style black trousers. Event-ready bundle.
